calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming That The Springing Power Of Attorney Of Robert Fisher Is In Effect
Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Walter Cook for and with Eleanor Frangos (Trustee and Beneficiary)

Mr. Cook stated that Mr. Fisher was not present due to a bad hip and noted that there were signed waivers/consents on file by Mr. Fisher. In addition, he informed the Court there was a problem with the residence, that it was difficult trying to get the document to do what it was intended to do, that he was working with Wachovia, and noted that the original power of attorney had been lost. The Court granted the "Petition For Order Confirming That The Springing Power Of Attorney Of Robert Fisher Is In Effect" (signing an order for the same in open Court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy: Aguerre.

PETITION Petition For Order Confirming That The Springing Power Of Attorney Of Robert Fisher Is In Effect; And Confirming The Contract For Sale Of Real Propert
Off Calendar Jul-07-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Walter Cook for Eleanor Frangos (Petitiioner).

The Court stated that notice on the original petition was proper, that the June 25th declaration created a notice issue and triggered the new notice not being timely, and that the waiver was inconsistent as the first petition seeks Ms. Frangos power to sell to person A and was now selling to person B. In addition, the Court stated that the Power Of Attorney (POA) on execution was valid and that today's issue was that the terms of the POA had not been satisfied and that there were no declarations under penalty of perjury from either of the two Doctor's named in the POA. Furthermore, the Court stated that if Mr. Fisher was not deemed to lack capacity, why couldn't he enter into the agreement? The petition was denied without prejudice.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION Petition For Order Confirming That The Springing Power Of Attorney Of Robert Fisher Is In Effect; And Confirming The Contract For Sale Of Real Propert
Off Calendar Jun-30-2008 Continued To Jul-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
